title: Web Server Process Spawning Command Shell
description:
Detects a web server or scripting engine process spawning a command shell
(cmd.exe, powershell.exe, bash) with suspicious command-line arguments
containing pipe, semicolon, or other command injection characters.
This indicates successful Remote Code Execution (RCE) via the web application
(e.g., OS command injection in a FastAPI/Django/Express endpoint).
Covers MITRE ATT&CK T1059 (Command and Scripting Interpreter).
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Parent Process Name' like '*\\python.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\pythonw.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\python3.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\node.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\java.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\javaw.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\php.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\php-cgi.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\ruby.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\dotnet.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\httpd.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\nginx.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\w3wp.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\uvicorn.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\gunicorn')) and (('Process Name' like '*\\cmd.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\pwsh.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\bash.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\sh.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\wsl.exe')) and (('Command Line' like '*;*' or 'Command Line' like '*|*' or 'Command Line' like '*&&*' or 'Command Line' like '*||*' or 'Command Line' like '*`*' or 'Command Line' like '*$*' or 'Command Line' like '*/c whoami*' or 'Command Line' like '*/c id*' or 'Command Line' like '*/c cat*' or 'Command Line' like '*/c type*' or 'Command Line' like '*/c net*' or 'Command Line' like '*-enc *' or 'Command Line' like '*-EncodedCommand*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate deployment scripts run by web frameworks
CI/CD build processes spawning shells from web hooks
